flows.name: First Time User Onboarding
flows.description: Complete introduction to Obsession Tracker for new users

steps.title: Welcome to Obsession Tracker
steps.description: Learn the basics of using Obsession Tracker for GPS tracking and outdoor adventures

steps.title: Welcome to Obsession Tracker
steps.content: Welcome to Obsession Tracker! This app helps you track your outdoor adventures with privacy-first GPS tracking. Let's get you started with the basics.

steps.title: Privacy First Approach
steps.content: Your location data stays on your device. Obsession Tracker is designed with privacy in mind - your adventures are yours alone unless you choose to share them.

steps.title: Main Features
steps.content: Track your routes, capture photo waypoints, manage sessions, and explore with confidence. Everything you need for outdoor adventures in one app.

flows.name: Advanced Features Tour
flows.description: Discover advanced features for experienced users

steps.title: Advanced Features
steps.description: Explore advanced GPS tracking features and customization options

steps.title: Advanced GPS Settings
steps.content: Learn how to customize GPS accuracy, tracking intervals, and battery optimization for your specific needs.

steps.title: Photo Waypoints
steps.content: Discover how to capture and organize photo waypoints with metadata, tags, and custom categories.

steps.title: Data Export & Backup
steps.content: Learn how to export your tracking data in various formats and set up automatic backups.
